src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Consolidate multiple Lombok imports into a single wildcard import.
Add a new 'id' field to the AuthResponse model.
Normalize indentation from tabs to spaces.
Refactored individual Spring Web annotations into a wildcard import for brevity.
Added CrossOrigin annotation to enable CORS support for the authentication controller.
Injected AuthenticationManager to handle explicit authentication logic.
Added explicit authentication call using BCrypt via AuthenticationManager in the login flow.
Included user ID in the authentication response payload.
Removed unused signup endpoint stub.
Rename the error response model class from AuthError to AuthErrorResponse to reflect a more descriptive naming convention.
Update the instantiation of the error response object to use the new class name and map fields to the new schema (title, status, details).
Update the variable reference in the JSON serialization step to match the renamed error object.
Rename the authentication error response model class to reflect a more descriptive naming convention.
Update the instantiation of the error response object to use the new class name and its specific builder fields.
Update the variable reference used when serializing the error response to JSON.
Refactor token extraction to use intermediate variables instead of chained method calls.
Implement polymorphic authentication context setting by checking token suffix for employees.
Add missing authentication details and security context setting to the user authentication method.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.before:
UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken authentication
        = new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(user, null, authorities);

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Add new overloaded method to set authentication context for Employee entities.
Add import for the new Employee domain model to support the new authentication flow.
Add method to generate JWT tokens specifically for the Employee entity.
Add method to extract Employee details from a JWT token.
Reformat existing code to use 4-space indentation instead of tabs/mixed indentation.
Reorganize imports to group them logically and move Spring/JJWT imports to the top.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/q.general_idea: Add implementation for listAllResumed method delegating to DAO.
Introduce a generic type parameter to the DAO interface to allow flexible ID types.
Update the getById method signature to use the new generic type parameter for the ID.
Add a new method to retrieve a summarized list of quizzes.
Add id field to Question model to support entity identification
Update Option list to use generic wildcard to accommodate polymorphic option types
Add import for the new Option class location
Add @ToString annotation to Question class for better debugging output
Disable MapStruct annotation processing for the OptionMapper interface.
